MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NA., Demurrer. Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 922-5939, specially appearing for Plaintiff. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend to plead facts sufficient to state a claim as to Defendant's on the first through 6th causes of action.
